title: Supreme Court Collegium recommends appointment of 6 lawyers as Karnataka High Court judges
description: The Supreme Court Collegium has recommended the appointment of six lawyers as Karnataka High Court judges. The decision was taken in a Collegium meeting held on Tuesday, June 2. The advocates who have been proposed for appointment as judges are:(i) Raghavendra Seetharam Srivatsa,(ii) Hema Kulkarni,(iii) Subramanya Rangarao,(iv) Thadagavadi Prakash Vivekananda,(v) Bakkeswara Pramod, and(vi) Hombe Gowda Shanthi Bhushan.Recently, the Central government had cleared the appoi
